known_before_registration.note: The fixed path result was already known. The newly frozen content is the physical consistency matrix, deterministic source and photon branches, and escalation gates.

data.selection: finite mu, z>0.01, Pantheon+ calibrators excluded
data.primary_covariance: released STAT+SYS covariance or released total precision
data.normalisation: one identical profiled magnitude intercept per release for every model
data.H0_note: H0 is degenerate with the profiled release intercepts and is not interpreted as measured here.

constant_assumptions_for_source_diagnost.status: illustrative deterministic consequence, not a complete explosion model

COMPOSITE_S_FREE.purpose: measure only the composite photon/source power; not theory evidence

registered_sensitivities: Pantheon+ calibration covariance reconstructed as STATONLY plus marginalised grouped offsets
DES all-systematics covariance reconstructed as STATONLY plus marginalised grouped offsets
double_count_guard: No release-contained calibration prior is added to released STAT+SYS covariance.
theory_gates: derived Q equals asserted Q over the observed redshift range
fixed-hbar Compton-frequency scaling equals the asserted clock scaling
the Chandrasekhar luminosity consequence is compatible with the released supernova likelihood
photon transfer and intrinsic luminosity are separately predicted rather than fitted as one composite
an action-level clock, matter and electromagnetic model is supplied
escalation_rule: Proceed to Pantheon+ light-curve-level refitting only if the primary statistical gate and every theory gate pass.
claim_boundary: Failure is evidence against this explicit closure, not against every possible FR, varying-constant or static-universe theory. The free composite power diagnoses missing physics and is not confirmatory.
